name: Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 3 inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine dates, walnuts, baking soda, salt, and vegetable shortening. Pour boiling water over the mixture and stir until smooth. Let stand for 15 minutes.
4. In another bowl, beat eggs and sugar with a fork until well blended. Gradually add whole wheat flour and all-purpose flour, stirring to form a stiff batter. Stir in the date mixture until combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool in pan for 10 minutes before sliding a knife around edges and turning onto a rack to cool completely.
7. The bread freezes well.
